description: Patient on warfarin (blood thinner) has it listed twice in the discharge prescription. A double dose of warfarin can cause fatal internal bleeding.
patient_context: 72-year-old male with atrial fibrillation, type 2 diabetes, and hypertension. Admitted for elective knee replacement surgery.

planted_issues.description: Warfarin appears twice in the discharge list. Double dosing a blood thinner can cause fatal hemorrhage.
